posts.author: Capitalist_55
posts.text: Time based order execution — Based on my understanding you can create it on streak. For 9:20am execution you can use time based in option strategies section and for price near 150 , you can use price based selection. posts.author: K_Vinod_Kumar
posts.text: Time based order execution — Is there any way we can execute order at particular time. Example, if i want to execute orders to buy both CE and PE at exactly by 9.20 which has the closest premium of 150. Can we set condition like this. Is there any provision in zerodha or in any other brokerage platform to do like this…
